calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Existence Of Trust And Order Determining Title To Assets
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Mr. Wade stated that the Examiner's notes impose that there was a legal impediment to his Client transferring the asset to the trust, that maybe it was a company policy, that everything shows their intent to transfer everything to the trust and that he does not believe there was any legal impediment. The Petition for Order Confirming Existence of Trust, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
